import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    b = [0] * n
    
    start = 0
    if n % 2 == 1:
        # Handle first 3 elements
        a0, a1, a2 = a[0], a[1], a[2]
        if a0 + a1 != 0:
            b[0] = a2; b[1] = a2; b[2] = -(a0 + a1)
        elif a0 + a2 != 0:
            b[0] = a1; b[2] = a1; b[1] = -(a0 + a2)
        else:
            b[1] = a0; b[2] = a0; b[0] = -(a1 + a2)
        start = 3
    
    # Handle remaining pairs
    for i in range(start, n, 2):
        b[i] = a[i+1]
        b[i+1] = -a[i]
    
    print(*b)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
